about.disclaimer: This application is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Hugging Face, Inc. "Hugging Face" is a trademark of Hugging Face, Inc., used here only to refer to the service this application connects to.
about.privacy: Privacy: everything stays on your machine. No telemetry, no analytics. Your token is encrypted with your OS keychain and stored locally.
about.title: About

updates.available: Version {{version}} is available from GitHub Releases.
updates.description: Updates are checked against the latest published GitHub Release.

errors.configuration: The GitHub Release update metadata is unavailable.
errors.network: Couldn't reach GitHub Releases. Check your connection and try again.
errors.permission: The updater doesn't have permission to install this update.
errors.unknown: The update couldn't be completed. Try again or install it from GitHub Releases.
errors.verification: The update couldn't be verified, so it wasn't installed.

updates.manual: Version {{version}} is available. This unsigned build must be updated manually.
updates.ready: Version {{version}} is ready. Restart the app to install it.
updates.title: App updates
updates.unsupported: In-app updates are available only in installed builds.

billing.empty: No usage recorded for the current period.
billing.gated: Billing usage requires the read-billing permission. Re-authorize to grant it.
billing.title: Billing usage
billing.unauthorized: The Hub did not authorize this token to read billing usage.

hub.missingScopes: Missing permissions: {{scopes}}. Re-authorize to grant them.
hub.scopesUnknown: The permissions granted to this session are unknown. Re-authorize to refresh them.
hub.title: Hub account
hub.tokenHint: Signed in with a User Access Token. What this app can do is decided by the token's own permissions on the Hub — including the Hub notification inbox, which browser sign-in can't reach.

desktop.closeHintMac: Closing the window hides the app to the menu bar tray. Quit from the tray menu or Dock to exit fully.
desktop.closeHintOther: Closing the window hides the app to the system tray. Quit from the tray menu to exit fully.
desktop.launchAtLoginHint: Start Oh My HuggingFace when you sign in to this computer.
desktop.title: Desktop

network.description: Override the Hub API base URL and optionally route traffic through an HTTP(S) proxy. Leave blank to use defaults.
network.downloadWarning: In-flight downloads may keep the previous endpoint or proxy until they are paused and resumed.
network.invalidUrl: Enter a valid http:// or https:// URL, or leave blank.
network.title: Network

local.confirmBody: Choose what to remove on this device:
local.description: Clears selected favorites, history, download records, follows, and inbox on this device. Does not delete model or dataset files in the HF cache.
local.successSignedOut: Local data cleared. You have been signed out.
local.title: App local data

transfer.description: Export or import appearance and preference settings as JSON. Does not include account tokens or library data. Cache directory on this machine is kept when importing.
transfer.title: Settings transfer

profile.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG or WebP, up to 10 MB.
profile.needsSession: Editing your public profile needs a Hub web session — connect one under Account.
profile.primaryOrgHint: Only Team / Enterprise / Plus organizations can be set as primary. The menu groups available vs unavailable options.
profile.primaryOrgNonePaid: None of your organizations are on a paid plan, so a primary organization can’t be set yet.
profile.title: Public profile
